Oxygen.title: Oxygen
Oxygen.description: Oxygen is an oxidising agent, and most humanoid life forms use this for breathing.

Nitrogen.title: Nitrogen
Nitrogen.description: Nitrogen is a common element in the universe, and is present in most organic compounds.

CarbonDioxide.title: Carbon Dioxide
CarbonDioxide.description: Carbon Dioxide is a respiratory by-product of most humanoid life forms.

Hazardous.title: Hazardous
Hazardous.description: Hazardous gas is a collective term for any gas that is considered toxic or otherwise harmful to most humanoid life forms.

Explosive.title: Explosive
Explosive.description: Explosive gas is a collective term for any gas that is considered flammable or explosive.
